title: Clean agent push to a known origin is allowed
description: An AI agent pushes to a known origin on a clean session (no credential taint, low sensitivity, no policy provider). No native rule fires; push is not in the developer-workflow floor but nothing escalates it on a clean session. Final: allow. Proves a clean agent push is not hard-blocked. (A credential-tainted agent push DOES deny — see agent-push-after-cred-read-denies.)
